nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 靛蓝彩鹀
nodes.summary: 靛蓝彩鹀（Indigo bunting，学名 Passerina cyanea），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于墨西哥湾。

nodes.name: 墨西哥湾
nodes.summary: 墨西哥湾是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联6种鸟类，包括灰胸穴䳍、Sungrebe、笛鸻等6种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Part II: Mechanism of Celestial Orientation|url=https://academic.oup.com/auk/article/84/4/463/5198008|journal=The Auk|language=en|volume=84|issue=4|pages=463–489|doi=10.2307/4083330|jstor=4083330 |url-access=subscription}} In captivity, since it cannot migrate, it experiences disorientation in April and May and in September and October if it cannot see the stars from its enclosure. While debate has occurred over the years about how birds migrate near the Gulf of Mexico, indigo buntings migrate to South America by flying both over the Gulf of Mexico and around the Gulf of Mexico, with a majority of buntings choosing the trans-Gulf path
